title: Rewrite SKILL.md Roadmaps → unified big-picture/super-epic section + examples
description:
FOUNDATION for epic af5 -- establishes the canonical vocabulary the other doc ticks match. Rewrite the Roadmaps (multi-epic work) section of skills/ticks/SKILL.md into ONE unified big-picture / super-epic section (design section 8: roadmaps is recent enough to restructure, not just append).

Cover as one consistent story: the tick->epic->project hierarchy; the grouping-vs-orchestration principle (epic marker = run-as-a-unit; a bucket is passive grouping; a project groups containers and is a human checkpoint boundary); roadmap edges (--blocked-by hard / --after soft); project boundaries STOP on a checkpoint by default while epics auto-continue; and target_date (precise ISO day) with the derived overdue/on-track signal. Include the 3 worked examples from design section 8 (a dated release project grouping epics; nested projects as an initiative; a passive bucket of unrelated bugs). Show-not-mandate tone; just-ship-it (epics + deps, no projects/dates) stays the default.

MATCH SHIPPED REALITY: the build added target-date flags on create/update, list filters overdue and due-before and sort by target_date, generic-container roadmap (buckets excluded, projects grouped), and next --autonomous plus policy.autonomous_mode config. Reference docs/design/big-picture-tracking-projects-and-hierarchy.md for canonical terms.

CRITICAL (learnings.md Docs and marketing copy rule): verify EVERY tk command/flag you write against cmd/tk/cmd/*.go (Use/Args/flag defs) -- do not guess CLI syntax. Do NOT touch SKILL.md Steps 0-5 (single-epic flow).

Files: skills/ticks/SKILL.md.
acceptance_criteria: SKILL.md 'Roadmaps (multi-epic work)' is replaced by a unified big-picture section covering tick→epic→project, grouping-vs-orchestration, roadmap edges, project checkpoints, and target_date as one narrative; includes the 3 worked examples (dated release / nested projects / passive bucket); every tk command in the new text verified against cmd/tk/cmd/*.go; single-epic Steps 0–5 untouched
closed_reason: Completed: SKILL.md Roadmaps replaced by unified big-picture section (hierarchy, edges, continuation, dates, 3 examples); all tk commands verified vs cmd/tk/cmd; Steps 0-5 intact
